skills.name: Mass
skills.description: x{@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Pardon] Apply Mass buff to yourself. Immediately restores a fixed number of HP over the caster's maximum HP at the time of casting, followed by an additional equal number of HP every 5 seconds. Each stack of the buff increases the SP consumed and HP recovered, with a maximum stack of 3. This skill is not affected by healing.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time 1.4 seconds
Recover CaptionRatio % of the Maximum HP per stack
Duration: 30 seconds

skills.name: Evil Burn
skills.description: {#FF0000}[Sin] Focus your mind to channel the energy of the flames. Unleash an aura of elicited flame, burning enemies for their sins with three consecutive attacks. The enemy then burns and continues to suffer.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time 1.2 seconds
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio
Debuff Damage: per tic, 30% of the damage directly inflicted
Debuff Duration: 15 seconds

skills.name: Atonement
skills.description: {#FF0000}[Sin] Judge your enemies with divine power. Enemies are constantly damaged by your divine power.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time 1.2 seconds
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Debuff Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Evangelism
skills.description: {#FF0000}[Sin] Focus your mind to condense and release divine energy, moving it forward. The released energy moves slowly and deals holy damage to nearby targets.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time 1 second
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Gospel
skills.description: {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Pardon] Demonstrate your faith through hymns. With unwavering faith, you gain an effect that increases the damage dealt by your Pontifex skills to enemies. You also recover all of your HP/SP. Healing from this skill is not subject to the healing reduction effect.

skills.name: Didache: Absolution
skills.description: {@st66_y}{#22B14C}[Pardon] Focus your mind and release unstable fire energy forward. The released energy travels and deals fire damage to nearby targets.
skills.effect_text:
Casting Time 1.5 seconds
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Number of Targets: 10

attributes.name: Mass: Hymn
attributes.description:
* Healing effects extend to nearby party members but are reduced by the number of party members affected

* Removes effects when turning on/off

attributes.name: Absolution
attributes.description: * Does not apply the effects of the Sin buff on activation

attributes.name: Atonement: Punishment
attributes.description: * Enemies affected by Atonement deal damage to a narrow area, but the damage is reduced by the number of targets (up to 10).

attributes.name: Evil Burn: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Evil Burn] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Atonement: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Atonement] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Evangelism: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Evangelism] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Didache: Absolution: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Didache: Absolution] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Didache: Eschaton
attributes.description: * Collides with [Holy Energy] released by Evangelism and explodes, dealing damage to the nearby area (Number of Targets: 20)

attributes.name: [Arts] Gospel: Hymn
attributes.description: * Extends the damage increase effect range to nearby party members, increases the final damage of all attacks, but reduces their effect.

attributes.name: [Arts] Evangelism: Subjection
attributes.description: * Sphere spawns in front and does not move. This is not removed when Didache: Eschaton effect is triggered

attributes.name: [Arts] Evil Burn: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Evil Burn] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Atonement: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Atonement] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Evangelism: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Evangelism] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Didache: Absolution: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Didache: Absolution] by 1.25% per attribute level
